message:
Add detect command for discovering installed AI coding agents

Introduces `caam detect` to scan the system for AI coding CLI tools
(Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, etc.) and report their installation
status, authentication state, and configuration paths.

- DetectedAgent struct with binary path, version, auth status
- Status categorization: ready, needs_auth, not_found, unavailable
- JSON output support for scripting integration
- Config and auth path discovery per agent

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
